testcase.name: test_calendar_events_still_work

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing events in response assert 'events' in {'data': [{'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:03:54.307000+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:04:48.622452+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:09:10.350653+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, ...], 'total': 57}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration75_sprint_ae.py:399: in test_calendar_events_still_work assert "events" in data, "Missing events in response" E AssertionError: Missing events in response E assert 'events' in {'data': [{'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:03:54.307000+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:04:48.622452+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:09:10.350653+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, ...], 'total': 57}
